parameters: Collect one hundred Poison Fangs. When you're done, come back to
me and I'll let you move on to the next area.
Let's see how many you've got. Hmm... \INUM[85]. Still not enough.
Most of the other teams have already gone on ahead. You'll need to
hurry if you want to face the king.
This is the hunting area used in the Saint Coliseum. The monsters
kept here have been breeding left and right.
A treasure chest. It's already been emptied.
A treasure chest. It's already been emptied.
Kalinka catches the Superlative Gentleman's eye. Accept his request?
Collect one hundred Poison Fangs in the hunting area. When you're
done, speak to the soldier at the entrance.
Poison Fangs drop from jinus. Kill them and rip out their teeth.
Still, the jinu's venom's pretty pernicious. It's a really terrifying
Ugh... All the hard labor's sapped my strength. Please,
There should be more Poison Fangs left by those who've given up.
If you find yourself poisoned after a battle, use a Detox Seed.
Please... If we can take down the king, we can change the laws
I don't want to kill any more people... Please...
Ever since I ate that meal in the special room, my body hasn't been
moving the way I want it to... Take this...
Take the king down in my place... Ugh...
Ugh, I finally managed to stand back up. I've been waiting for the
Saint Coliseum for four years, but I can't go like this.
The buildings you see all around contain audience seating!
They ensure a proper bird's-eye view!
Make sure you don't cause damage to any of them! If you do, you'll
be immediately disqualified and sent to the Slave Internment Camp!
There's a warm, glowing light. Fully restore the party?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
Ngh... This jinu venom's going to have me immobilized for a while.
Both the jinus and the soldiers are weak to wind magic.
If only I had some of my own...
